# Constitution / Policy Amendment Pull Request
# 章程/政策修订拉取请求

> **IMPORTANT:** All changes to Constitution, policies, or compliance documents must follow the [Compliance Git Flow](../GOVERNANCE.md). Do NOT merge without required Committee approvals.
>
> **重要：** 所有章程、政策或合规文件的变更必须遵循[合规Git流程](../GOVERNANCE.md)。未获必要的理事会批准，不得合并。

---

## 1. Change Summary / 变更摘要

**Type of change / 变更类型:**
- [ ] Constitutional amendment (requires Special Resolution — 75% vote at GM)
- [ ] Policy amendment (requires Committee resolution)
- [ ] New policy / document (requires Committee resolution)
- [ ] Minor correction / formatting (Secretary approval only)
- [ ] Other: ___________________________

**Documents changed / 修改的文件:**
*(List each file changed and a brief description of the change)*

| File | Nature of Change |
|------|----------------|
| | |
| | |

**Brief description of why this change is needed / 变更原因简述:**

---

## 2. Legislative Compliance Check / 法规合规性检查

*Answer for each document changed:*

- [ ] Change is consistent with the Incorporated Societies Act 2022
- [ ] Change does not remove any Section 26 mandatory constitutional provision
- [ ] Change does not undermine the prohibition on Financial Gain for members (Subpart 2)
- [ ] Change does not compromise Natural Justice principles (Section 39 / Schedule 2)
- [ ] Change does not affect Contact Person requirements (Section 113)
- [ ] Change is consistent with Charities Act 2005 and HCCA's charitable purposes
- [ ] If constitutional amendment: Registrar notification will be submitted within 20 working days of adoption

---

## 3. Approval Trail / 批准记录

### For Policy Amendments (Committee resolution required):
- [ ] Proposed change presented to Committee meeting on: **[DATE]**
- [ ] Committee resolution passed: ☐ Yes ☐ No — Resolution number: _______
- [ ] Committee members who voted FOR: ___________________________
- [ ] Committee members who voted AGAINST / abstained: ___________________________
- [ ] Conflict of interest disclosures: ___________________________

### For Constitutional Amendments (Special Resolution required):
- [ ] 21 days' notice of proposed amendment given to all members
- [ ] Special General Meeting / AGM held on: **[DATE]**
- [ ] Total financial members at time of vote: _____
- [ ] Votes FOR: _____ (must be ≥75% of votes cast)
- [ ] Votes AGAINST: _____
- [ ] Abstentions: _____
- [ ] **Special Resolution PASSED:** ☐ Yes ☐ No

---

## 3.5 Chinese Reference File Sync (MANDATORY) / 中文参考版同步（必须）

> **Per [GOVERNANCE.md Section 6](../GOVERNANCE.md): every PR that modifies a primary English document MUST include a corresponding update to the `_ZH_REF.md` Chinese reference file in the same PR. Missing sync = PR cannot be merged.**
>
> **依据 GOVERNANCE.md 第6节：每个修改英文主版本的PR，必须在同一PR中同步更新对应的 `_ZH_REF.md` 文件。未同步 = 不可合并。**

For each modified primary English document, confirm the Chinese reference file was also updated:

| Primary English File Modified | ZH_REF File Updated | All Changes Reflected |
|-------------------------------|--------------------|-----------------------|
| *(filename).md* | *(filename)_ZH_REF.md* ☐ | ☐ Yes |
| *(filename).md* | *(filename)_ZH_REF.md* ☐ | ☐ Yes |
| *(filename).md* | *(filename)_ZH_REF.md* ☐ | ☐ Yes |

- [ ] ALL modified English primary files have their `_ZH_REF.md` updated in this PR (not in a separate PR)
- [ ] Chinese versions retain all legal terms, Act/Section references, policy names, and officer titles in English
- [ ] A bilingual Committee member has reviewed the Chinese translation for accuracy
- [ ] The GitHub Actions `zh-ref-check` passes (confirms all `_ZH_REF.md` files are present)

## 4. Review Sign-Off / 审核签字

Before merging, the following approvals are required:

| Role | Requirement | GitHub Username | Approved |
|------|------------|----------------|---------|
| President | All constitutional amendments | @president | ☐ |
| Secretary | All amendments | @secretary | ☐ |
| Treasurer | Financial policy amendments | @treasurer | ☐ |

**Merge conditions:**
- Constitutional amendment: **minimum 2 reviewers** including President
- Policy amendment: **minimum 1 reviewer** (must be a Committee member)
- Minor correction: Secretary approval sufficient

---

## 5. Post-Merge Actions / 合并后行动

- [ ] Registrar notified (if constitutional amendment) — within 20 working days
- [ ] Charities Services notified (if applicable)
- [ ] Members notified of the change
- [ ] Relevant officers briefed on the updated policy
- [ ] Link to this PR recorded in the Committee meeting minutes

---

*By submitting this PR, I confirm that the changes described above accurately reflect a duly authorised decision of the HCCA Committee or membership, as applicable.*
